calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurence Haveson of Moscone Emblidge & Otis telephone number 415-362-3599 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff.
Matthew Kenefick of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Mitchell LLP telephone number 415-398-8080 appeared by telephone for Defendant.

In re: PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement - The Court granted the motion and approved the settlement. Mr. Haveson will provide a proposed order and a proposed judgment which is to have the consent judgment attached.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
